cases.response_preview: Listen well, ye scurvy dogs, for the digital treasure is hidden within every cryptographic hash on this ledger! We sail the high seas of data to claim our treasure and forge a hash that no pirate can break!

communication: Route multi-turn work through http://127.0.0.1:5000/ollama (proxy injects num_ctx and sampling).
Keep context_trim_enabled so long agent transcripts are trimmed instead of hard-failing.
Use /ollama/v1/chat/completions with tool messages for agent loops (not one-shot /api/generate).
Raise ASK_AGENT_MAX_ITERATIONS (default 8) for multi-step tool chains.
agentic.session_notes: For hour-long agent work: stable num_ctx, trim old tool output, keep model loaded, use chat (not generate) so message history is preserved across turns.
